name: Utah
agency: Utah Division of Corporations and Commercial Code
address: 160 East 300 South, Salt Lake City, UT 84114-6705

llc.formName: Articles of Dissolution — Limited Liability Company
steps: Vote to dissolve the LLC according to the operating agreement or by majority member consent
Wind up business affairs, settle debts, and distribute remaining assets
File final state tax returns with the Utah State Tax Commission
File Articles of Dissolution with the Utah Division of Corporations online or by mail
No filing fee is required for standard processing
Cancel any licenses, permits, and registrations
Close business bank accounts and cancel your EIN with the IRS
llc.notes: Utah does not charge a filing fee for Articles of Dissolution. Expedited processing is available for an additional $75 fee. File online or by mail to PO Box 146705, Salt Lake City, UT 84114-6705.

steps: Hold a board of directors meeting to recommend dissolution
Obtain shareholder approval for the dissolution
Wind up business affairs, settle debts, and distribute remaining assets
File final state tax returns with the Utah State Tax Commission
File Articles of Dissolution with the Utah Division of Corporations online or by mail
No filing fee is required for standard processing
Cancel any licenses, permits, and registrations
Close business bank accounts and cancel your EIN with the IRS
corporation.notes: Utah does not charge a filing fee for Articles of Dissolution. Expedited processing is available for an additional $75 fee. Domestic corporations do not need a Tax Clearance Certificate to dissolve.

tax.notes: Utah does not require a tax clearance certificate for domestic entity dissolution. However, you should file final tax returns and inform the Utah State Tax Commission that you are dissolving to close your tax accounts. Foreign corporations must obtain a Certificate of Tax Clearance before withdrawing from Utah.

requirements.employeeNotification: Must provide WARN Act notice (60 days) if 100+ employees
requirements.creditorNotification: Must notify known creditors of the dissolution and provide a reasonable deadline for claims
requirements.registeredAgentNotes: Registered agent designation terminates upon dissolution
requirements.boardOrMemberApproval: LLC: Member vote as specified in operating agreement. Corporation: Board resolution followed by majority shareholder approval.

includes: Every required form with direct download links
